03-the-dollhouse.jpg.alt: Pink-lit haunted house "The Dollhouse" with a doll figure on the balcony
03-the-dollhouse.jpg.caption: The Dollhouse — and yes, the doll on the balcony is looking back.

12-teddy-blindfold-baum.jpg.alt: Large teddy bear blindfolded and tied to a tree, red light
12-teddy-blindfold-baum.jpg.caption: Blindfolded, tied to the tree: the teddy knew too much.

13-teddy-kinderbahn.jpg.alt: Sooty teddy bear on an old children's train
13-teddy-kinderbahn.jpg.caption: Hop on? …think we'll pass.

14-teddy-zwischen-kiefern.jpg.alt: Teddy bear stretched between two pine trees, a roller coaster behind
14-teddy-zwischen-kiefern.jpg.caption: Someone really had it in for plush around here.

15-hasen-kostuem.jpg.alt: Shaggy white rabbit walkabout character among visitors in daylight
15-hasen-kostuem.jpg.caption: The fluffiest face in the park. And, honestly, the creepiest.

16-eichhoernchen-pilot-pilzturm.jpg.alt: Well overgrown with dead vines, an aviator figure on top, lit blue at night
16-eichhoernchen-pilot-pilzturm.jpg.caption: A well the dead vines swallowed long ago.

25-geisterbraut-puppe-felsen.jpg.alt: Grey-painted figure climbing over mossy rocks by day
25-geisterbraut-puppe-felsen.jpg.caption: Is that someone crawling out of the rock? Don't look, keep walking.
